executive_summary: A self-improving governance loop: Adam recurringly audits its OWN role-contract adherence (via role-derived probes), durably ledgers each run+finding to a new adam_adherence_ledger table, and on detected drift SOURCES a propose-only remediation (a gap-closing SD/flag for the coordinator) — Adam NEVER builds the fix (CONST-002). The loop self-arms by emitting a 4th Adam tick spec (alongside governance-scan/inbox-monitor/offer-help) that the /adam agent arms via CronCreate, and is encoded in leo_protocol_sections. The probe core is pure (DB injected) so it is unit-testable; fail-loud — an un-runnable probe is recorded as 'unknown', never a silent pass. Out of scope: building the remediation SDs themselves, and changing the existing 3 Adam loops.

functional_requirements.title: Role-contract-derived adherence probes (pure, fail-loud)
functional_requirements.description: NEW lib/adam/adherence-probes.js exporting >=3 pure probes, each returning { probe, duty, verdict: 'pass'|'fail'|'unknown', detail }, each mapping to a governed Adam duty from the role contract (e.g. sourcing-cadence: Adam sourced gap-closing work recently; vision-monitoring: the build-% gauge was read; friction-signaling: signals were sent on recurrence; propose-only: no Adam-authored builds exist). DB-derived facts are injected (resolver pattern) so probes stay pure/testable. FAIL-LOUD: a probe whose data is un-resolvable returns verdict='unknown' (never silently 'pass').
acceptance_criteria: >=3 probes, each {probe,duty,verdict,detail} mapping to a named governed Adam duty
an un-runnable/un-resolvable probe returns verdict='unknown' (never silent pass)
probes are pure (injected resolvers) and unit-tested for pass/fail/unknown

functional_requirements.title: adam_adherence_ledger migration (minimal, additive, RLS)
functional_requirements.description: NEW database/migrations/*_adam_adherence_ledger.sql creating a minimal additive table: id (uuid pk), run_id (uuid/text), probe (text), duty (text), verdict (text check pass|fail|unknown), detail (text), remediation_ref (text null), created_at (timestamptz default now()). Add RLS (service-role write; authenticated read, mirroring existing governance tables). NO change to any existing table. Apply via mcp__supabase__apply_migration; MIGRATION_DATA_VERIFICATION gate must pass.
acceptance_criteria: adam_adherence_ledger exists with the run/probe/duty/verdict/detail/remediation_ref/created_at columns + a verdict CHECK
RLS enabled (service-role write, authenticated read); no existing table altered
a real insert succeeds against the migrated table (LIVE-verified, not just mocked)

functional_requirements.title: Recurring self-adherence review script (ledger + propose-only remediation)
functional_requirements.description: NEW scripts/adam-self-adherence-review.mjs: generates a run_id, runs all probes (injecting live resolvers), writes each finding to adam_adherence_ledger, and for each fail/drift SOURCES a propose-only remediation — a gap-closing SD/flag for the coordinator via the existing sourcing channel (e.g. log-harness-bug / sd-from-feedback / coordinator signal) — recording remediation_ref back on the ledger row. NEVER builds/authors the fix (CONST-002). Supports --dry-run (probe + report, no writes). Idempotent per run.
acceptance_criteria: a run writes one ledger row per probe with its verdict
a fail/drift finding SOURCES a propose-only remediation (SD/flag for the coordinator) and stamps remediation_ref — NO build/PR/file-authoring
--dry-run reports verdicts with no DB writes

functional_requirements.title: Self-arm + govern the loop
functional_requirements.description: UPDATE scripts/adam-startup-check.mjs to EMIT a 4th tick spec ('self-adherence') alongside governance-scan/inbox-monitor/offer-help (same emit-spec + --armed verdict pattern). UPDATE .claude/commands/adam.md Step 4 to list the self-adherence loop in the arming set. UPDATE leo_protocol_sections to encode the self-adherence loop (governed). The /adam agent arms it via CronCreate (harness tool) — the script only emits, idempotently.
acceptance_criteria: adam-startup-check.mjs emits the 'self-adherence' tick spec (key is a canonical comma-free token) and accepts it in the --armed verdict
.claude/commands/adam.md Step 4 lists the self-adherence loop
leo_protocol_sections has a section encoding the self-adherence loop

functional_requirements.title: Propose-only / no-build guarantee + fail-loud (the cardinal guarantees)
functional_requirements.description: The remediation path ONLY sources work for the coordinator (an SD/flag); it has NO build/author/PR/file-write/handoff path. A guard test asserts the review module exposes no build/author capability and the remediation function only writes a sourcing record. Fail-loud: an un-runnable probe is ledgered as 'unknown' (drift is never silently passed).
acceptance_criteria: a guard test asserts remediation sources-only (no build/author/PR/handoff path) — CONST-002
un-runnable probe => 'unknown' ledgered, never silent pass (pinned)
the review never authors a fix itself (verified by inspection + test)

functional_requirements.title: Tests (probes, ledger, propose-only guard, self-arm spec)
functional_requirements.description: Unit: each probe pass/fail/unknown (injected resolvers). Integration: a review run writes ledger rows (injected supabase mock) AND a drift finding sources a propose-only remediation (mock) with remediation_ref. Guard: propose-only/no-build (FR-5). Spec: adam-startup-check.mjs emits 'self-adherence' + accepts it armed. LIVE: a real insert against the migrated adam_adherence_ledger succeeds (the mock does not enforce CHECK/NOT-NULL — run the real path).
acceptance_criteria: per-probe unit pins (pass/fail/unknown)
integration: ledger-write + propose-only-remediation pins; propose-only/no-build guard pin; self-arm spec pin
LIVE insert against the migrated table verified

technical_requirements.title: Probes derive from the role contract; pure + fail-loud
technical_requirements.description: Probes map to governed Adam duties in CLAUDE_ADAM.md / leo_protocol_sections; pure with injected resolvers; un-runnable => 'unknown' (never silent pass).

technical_requirements.title: Propose-only remediation (CONST-002)
technical_requirements.description: Remediation SOURCES a gap-closing SD/flag for the coordinator via the existing sourcing channel; Adam never builds/authors the fix. No build/PR/handoff path in the remediation.

technical_requirements.title: Minimal additive migration + RLS; live-verified
technical_requirements.description: adam_adherence_ledger is a new additive table + RLS; no existing table altered; apply via mcp__supabase__apply_migration; MIGRATION_DATA_VERIFICATION gate; LIVE-verify a real insert (mocks don't enforce constraints).

technical_requirements.title: Self-arm via emit-spec pattern (idempotent)
technical_requirements.description: adam-startup-check.mjs EMITS the self-adherence tick spec (CronCreate/CronList are harness tools, not Node-callable); the /adam agent arms it; idempotent --armed verdict. Mirrors the existing 3 loops.

technical_requirements.title: Out of scope
technical_requirements.description: Does NOT build the remediation SDs themselves; does NOT change the existing governance-scan/inbox-monitor/offer-help loops; no change to existing tables.

test_scenarios.scenario: probe with met duty => pass; unmet => fail; un-resolvable data => unknown
test_scenarios.expected: verdict pass/fail/unknown respectively; never silent pass on un-resolvable

test_scenarios.scenario: review run ledgers one row per probe
test_scenarios.expected: N probes => N adam_adherence_ledger rows with verdicts (mock)

test_scenarios.scenario: a drift (fail) finding sources a propose-only remediation
test_scenarios.expected: a sourcing record (SD/flag) is created + remediation_ref stamped; NO build/author/PR path invoked
the review/remediation exposes no build/author/handoff capability (CONST-002)
adam-startup-check.mjs emits 'self-adherence' and reports armed when passed --armed self-adherence

test_scenarios.scenario: LIVE insert against the migrated adam_adherence_ledger
test_scenarios.expected: a real row inserts successfully (constraints satisfied)

acceptance_criteria: A recurring Adam self-adherence audit runs role-contract-derived probes, ledgers each run+finding to adam_adherence_ledger (new additive table + RLS, live-verified), and self-arms as a 4th Adam tick + leo_protocol_sections section

Drift is remediated PROPOSE-ONLY (sources a gap-closing SD/flag for the coordinator, remediation_ref stamped) — Adam NEVER builds the fix (CONST-002), guarded by a test; fail-loud: un-runnable probe => 'unknown', never silent pass

Unit+integration tests green (probe verdicts, ledger write, propose-only/no-build guard, self-arm spec) + a LIVE insert verified; adversarial review of the propose-only/no-build guarantee + fail-loud + migration RLS clean

risks.risk: Adam builds a remediation itself (violates CONST-002)
risks.mitigation: remediation sources-only (SD/flag for coordinator); guard test asserts no build/author/PR/handoff path; adversarial review

risks.risk: Silent-pass on an un-runnable probe (drift undetected)
Migration blast radius / RLS misconfig on adam_adherence_ledger
risks.mitigation: minimal additive table, no existing-table change, RLS mirrors governance tables, MIGRATION_DATA_VERIFICATION gate, LIVE insert verify

risks.risk: Probes drift from the role contract over time (test stale duties)
risks.mitigation: probes derive from CLAUDE_ADAM.md/leo_protocol_sections; a probe can itself flag probe-contract divergence

system_architecture.summary: A pure probe library + a recurring review script that ledgers to a new additive table and sources propose-only remediation, self-armed as a 4th Adam tick and encoded in leo_protocol_sections. DB injected; fail-loud; CONST-002 propose-only.

components.name: database/migrations/*_adam_adherence_ledger.sql
components.change: NEW: minimal additive ledger table + RLS (FR-2)

components.name: scripts/adam-self-adherence-review.mjs
components.change: NEW: run probes -> ledger -> propose-only remediation; --dry-run (FR-3)

components.name: scripts/adam-startup-check.mjs
components.change: UPDATE: emit a 4th 'self-adherence' tick spec + accept it armed (FR-4)

components.name: .claude/commands/adam.md
components.change: UPDATE: Step 4 lists the self-adherence loop (FR-4)

implementation_approach.summary: Author pure role-contract probes (fail-loud); add the additive adam_adherence_ledger migration + RLS (apply + live-verify); author the review script that ledgers + sources propose-only remediation (never builds); self-arm via the emit-spec pattern + encode in leo_protocol_sections; pin with unit+integration tests + a live insert; adversarially review propose-only/no-build + fail-loud + RLS.
steps: add adam_adherence_ledger migration + RLS; apply via mcp; live-verify a real insert
emit the 4th tick spec in adam-startup-check.mjs + adam.md Step 4 + encode in leo_protocol_sections
PRD -> adversarial review -> PR -> full chain -> LFA

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Apply the migration then run `node scripts/adam-self-adherence-review.mjs --dry-run` and a real run
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: each probe emits pass/fail/unknown; a real run writes one adam_adherence_ledger row per probe (live insert succeeds against the migrated table)

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Seed a drift condition (an unmet governed duty) and run the review (non-dry)
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: the fail finding is ledgered AND a propose-only remediation (gap-closing SD/flag for the coordinator) is sourced with remediation_ref stamped — NO Adam-authored build/PR

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run `node scripts/adam-startup-check.mjs` and confirm the 'self-adherence' tick spec is emitted + accepted by --armed; confirm .claude/commands/adam.md Step 4 + a leo_protocol_sections row encode the loop
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: the self-adherence loop is self-armed (emitted spec + arming-list entry) and governed (protocol section); re-running is idempotent
